<td id="Card17190966" class="container GridSmall" width="295" height="240" style="background-color: #FFFFFF; vertical-align: top; ">

        <tbody>
            <tr height="160" style="box-shadow: 0px 5px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); ">
                <td>

            <tr style="height: 100%;">
                <td id="Title17190966" style="padding: 10px 10px 0px 10px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: top; background-color: #FFFFFF;" width="295" height="40">

                        More humiliation for Putin after £55,000,000 warship 'sunk by…
                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>

            <tr height="35">
                <td align="left">
                    <table style="margin: 5px 0px 8px 10px;">
                        <tbody>
                            <tr>

</tr>

<tr>
    <td align="center">
        <br>
        <div align="center" style="font-family:Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif;font-size: 20px; font-weight:normal;">

</tr>
